mentions.note: Largest US homebuilder; Q1 mixed but forward orders smashed (up 11% units, 10% dollars). Demand strong despite minimal rate relief. Sustainable only if rates fall further.
Low-priced home builder; Cramer hopes post-war rate cuts under Kevin Warsh-led Fed will ignite housing sector.
Down 3.3%; lower-end home builder; group downgrade artificial-seeming but builder sector broadly under pressure.
Only home builder showing meaningful strength; sector needs rate-cut catalysts to sustain rally.
Housing sector green shoots emerging: pricing down, mortgage rates down, potential 401k rule change could drive homebuilder upside.
